# TikTok Campaign — Blend Coffee Bar
## Location: Brambleton, VA
## Generated by: Community Trust Creative Agent

---

**Hook:** POV: you moved to Brambleton, didn't know a single neighbor, and then you found this place.
**Body/Script:** Okay so this is NOT a chain — two women started Blend because one of them is literally a licensed counselor who wanted Loudoun County to have a real "third place" to gather. They've got wine and beer after 5, an egg sandwich one of the co-owner's husbands invented, and a patio that turns into trivia night, open mic, or a full-on German Christmas Market depending on the week. I've made more friends here than anywhere else in this town.
**CTA:** Comment "BLEND" and we'll tell you what's happening this week
**Image Prompt:** Fast-cut handheld footage panning across Blend's packed outdoor patio at golden hour — string lights flickering on, a barista steaming milk in slow motion, then a quick cut to a crowded trivia night inside, everyone laughing.

---
